# Fixture Corpus

Fixtures are generated by `tests/fixtures/generate-fixtures.mjs` and intentionally stay within the MVP parser/redaction subset:

- `simple-text.pdf`
- `multi-page.pdf`
- `rotated-text.pdf`
- `type0-search.pdf`
- `vector-heavy.pdf`
- `image-xobject.pdf`
- `annotations.pdf`
- `metadata-attachments.pdf`
